title: segmentation fault on select query among big amount of data
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE mseed_catalog (starttime DATETIME NOT NULL, mseed INT CHECK (mseed >= 0));
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_13 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata FLOAT, PRIMARY KEY (mseed, seqno));
INSERT INTO mseed_data_sample_13 (mseed, seqno, idata) VALUES (1, 1, 3.14), (1, 2, NULL), (2, 1, 2.71);
SELECT ds.idata FROM mseed_catalog c JOIN mseed_data_sample_13 ds ON c.mseed = ds.mseed WHERE c.starttime BETWEEN '2005-01-19' AND '2005-01-21' AND ds.idata IS NOT NULL LIMIT 500;
key_bug_features: segmentation fault on select query with large data
